description: PR-mined: real upstream commit fd799d4ef9a53be68c3d3323710071cf2adb936d ('Translated using Weblate (English)', privacy-friendly-ruler). Retranslates a couple of strings (okay -> Ok; viewhelp picks up a stray French string, a genuine upstream Weblate mistranslation bug) plus incidental whitespace/XML-declaration normalization. No new string names, so no R regen needed -- resources-only relink.
